narrative:
Covington Ex Vill Sd (Miami) exempted village school district has 3,236 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.9 percentage points.
